overviewCopy.environmental: This module introduces environmental thinking in a practical, structured format. It helps the learner connect sustainability topics with decision-making, implementation quality, and measurable business context.
overviewCopy.social: This module is designed to strengthen understanding of people-focused ESG topics, including responsibility, stakeholder awareness, and the human impact of operational choices.
overviewCopy.governance: This module focuses on governance as a foundation for credible ESG practice. It connects policies, accountability, and decision quality with real implementation behaviour.
overviewCopy.crossCutting: This module builds a broad ESG foundation and helps the learner understand how environmental, social, and governance themes interact in real-world decision-making.

heroIntro.preQuiz: Begin with the opening checkpoint to unlock the lesson flow and establish your starting point.
heroIntro.lessons: You are currently progressing through the lesson sequence. Continue from where you left off.
heroIntro.postQuiz: You are at the final checkpoint. Complete the closing assessment to finish this module.
heroIntro.completed: This module has been completed. You can review your progress or continue with another topic.
heroIntro.default: Explore the module overview, outcomes, and learning flow before starting.

nextAction.title: Next action
nextAction.completedDescription: This module is finished. You can review or retake it.
nextAction.defaultDescription: Continue from your current step or explore the full learning flow first.

sections.overviewTitle: What this module is designed to achieve

insights.practicalText: The module is structured to translate ESG concepts into understandable, decision-oriented learning steps.
insights.progressionText: Each stage is designed to feel predictable and low-friction, making it easy to continue and complete the module.

flowDescriptions.opening: Begin with the opening checkpoint before entering the lesson sequence.
flowDescriptions.closing: Finish with the closing checkpoint after completing the lessons.
flowDescriptions.lessons: Progress through {completed}/{total} lessons in the core learning sequence.

progress.openingCheckpointEmpty: No opening checkpoint attempt saved yet.
progress.finalCheckpointEmpty: No final checkpoint attempt saved yet.

empty.title: Checkpoint content is not available yet
empty.description: This curriculum module does not yet include checkpoint content in the current dataset.

hero.title: Quiz with instant feedback
hero.description: Answer one question at a time and reveal the feedback immediately. This view is designed to keep learning clear, interactive, and easy to follow.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.incorrectDefault: This answer is not correct. Review the correction below.

empty.noModulesDescription: Start a module to build your personal learning library and return to it later.
empty.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting the search phrase or filters to explore available modules.
